title: Bronx DA — Shared Definitions
description: Reusable JSON Schema definitions shared across Office of the Bronx District Attorney object schemas. Because the Bronx DA publishes no Open Data and no API, these fields are reverse-engineered from the public /html/ SHTML site (bronxda.nyc.gov) and its embedded Power BI (Gov) dashboards. Deliberately generic across all five NYC borough District Attorney offices so the model can back one shared District Attorney API.

x-nyc-commons.note: Geography/identifier/address/money definitions are $ref'd from the canonical nyc-commons set; agency-specific definitions remain local.

Borough.$comment: Canonical definition provided by nyc-commons (geography.json#/$defs/Borough); migrated from a local definition. Back-compatible: the $defs name is unchanged, so object schemas referencing _common.json#/$defs/Borough still resolve.

County.description: New York County name for the office (prosecution is a county-level function). Bronx DA = 'Bronx'.

Coordinates.$comment: Canonical definition provided by nyc-commons (geography.json#/$defs/Coordinates); migrated from a local definition. Back-compatible: the $defs name is unchanged, so object schemas referencing _common.json#/$defs/Coordinates still resolve.

Geography.$comment: Canonical definition provided by nyc-commons (geography.json#/$defs/GeographySpine); migrated from a local definition. Back-compatible: the $defs name is unchanged, so object schemas referencing _common.json#/$defs/Geography still resolve.

ContactInfo.description: Public contact details for an office, bureau, unit, or program.

OfficeReference.description: A reference to the prosecuting office. Present on every record so a shared District Attorney API can distinguish the five borough offices.

office.description: Office name, e.g. 'Office of the Bronx District Attorney'.
office.default: Office of the Bronx District Attorney

districtAttorney.description: Name of the sitting District Attorney (Bronx: 'Darcel D. Clark').

Bureau.description: Organizational bureau / division the record belongs to, from the office's /html/bureaus/ pages.
enum: Office of Diversity, Equity and Inclusion
